name: Funus Aeternum
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Faded Legacy - Ch. 6 - Twisted Stars
descriptionTemplate: Grant all Awakeners 15 Aliemus. Suffer a Delayed {Sacrifice} equal to 5% of your Max HP.
lore:
I couldn't help her much; she single-handedly stopped the false god's descent.
Her soul will not fade; she will forever shine as a star of freedom.
